theme: Dark Mode Default with Vibrant Accents & Glassmorphism

typography.notes: Do not use Inter for headings. Use Outfit for a modern, startup feel and Manrope for clean readability.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use heavily on bottom nav, top headers, right-side action buttons in Reels feed, and comment bottom sheets. Must include a 1px subtle inner border (border-white/10) to separate from the background.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse ambient shadows (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] in dark mode) to create depth on cards and floating buttons.
visual_enhancers.corners: Generous border radii. Use rounded-2xl (16px) for cards/dialogs, rounded-3xl (24px) for bottom navs and large containers, and rounded-full for buttons/avatars.
visual_enhancers.depth: Layer UI elements: Background Video/Image -> Gradient Scrim (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent) -> Text -> Glassmorphism Controls.

components.bottom_nav: Premium pill-shaped or edge-to-edge glassmorphic bar (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/40 border-t border-white/10). Active states use subtle glows. Center button should be a floating gradient action button (FAB) elevated with a shadow.
components.reels_feed: Full-screen vertical swipe (snap-y snap-mandatory). Right side has vertical stack of glassmorphic action buttons (like, comment, share) with lucide-react icons. Bottom has user info, location, and description over a dark gradient scrim.
components.category_chips: Pill-shaped, vibrant gradient backgrounds (or dark backgrounds with gradient borders) to categorize civic issues (electricity, water, etc.). Horizontal scrollable list (no scrollbars).
components.inputs: Material Design 3 style floating labels. Dark surface background with 1px border. Focus state activates a subtle primary glow and border color change.
components.cards: For profile grid and search discover: sleek rectangles, no harsh borders, subtle image zoom on hover/press.
components.dialogs_bottom_sheets: Use for comments and post creation. Top corners heavily rounded (rounded-t-3xl), glassmorphic background, with a small pill drag-handle at the top.

grids_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-4 for standard mobile padding, p-6 for sheet content.
grids_layouts.profile_grid: 3-column grid (grid-cols-3) with gap-1 for the user's reported problems.
grids_layouts.alignment: Mobile-first approach. Ensure all text and critical UI elements are within safe areas (padding at bottom for nav bar).

motion.micro_interactions: active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-200 for all buttons and chips.
motion.page_transitions: Framer Motion slide-up and fade-in for bottom sheets and new screens. Staggered entrance for list items.
motion.loaders: Elegant gradient skeleton loaders (animate-pulse with dark gray backgrounds) for the Discover/Search screen while images load.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has a strong text-shadow or a dark gradient scrim behind it (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent).
accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements (buttons, icons in the Reels feed).

instructions_to_main_agent: Rename the app to 'Civic Reels' across the entire codebase.
Build out the application using React (.js/.jsx files) and Tailwind CSS.
Use lucide-react for all modern icons.
Make Dark Theme the default. Use deep blacks (#0A0A0A) as the base background.
Implement Material Design 3 style floating-label inputs for the onboarding and post creation forms.

Implement a vertical full-screen swipe feed (snap-y, snap-mandatory) like Instagram Reels/TikTok. Overlap the video/image with glassmorphic right-side action buttons and a bottom text area over a dark gradient scrim.
Create a modern Text Logo for 'Civic Reels' using the Outfit font with a gradient clip (bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-orange-500).
Replace standard borders with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl and border-white/10) for menus, bottoms sheets, and navs.
The bottom navigation bar should have an elevated center FAB (Floating Action Button) with a vibrant gradient background for creating new posts.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic by making creative, distinctive frontend designs.
Do not center-align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned). Left-align dense content for better reading.
Do not use universal transitions (transition: all). Target specific properties like transform or opacity.
Use glassmorphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) and 1px semi-transparent borders to separate from backgrounds.
Create depth with z-index hierarchy (shadows and layered gradients).
Incorporate micro-animations (hover/active states, active:scale-95) for all interactive elements.
Always use sonner for toast notifications.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., data-testid='submit-button').
Do NOT use complete transparent backgrounds where content scrolls underneath. Always use a blur or solid color.
Since the project uses .js/.jsx, ensure all Shadcn components or custom components are written in standard JS, not TypeScript.
